title: OpenCode config with Azure Foundry provider options
description: Composes the upstream OpenCode configuration schema and adds IntelliSense for provider entries loaded from azure-foundry-provider.

azureFoundryOptions.description: JSON-serializable options for azure-foundry-provider. Runtime-only function options such as fetch and callback hooks are intentionally excluded from this schema.

endpoint.description: Full Azure endpoint URL. Must use https://. Supported suffixes include /models/chat/completions, /chat/completions, /responses, /openai/v1/chat/completions, /openai/v1/responses, and /openai/v1. The /models/chat/completions path requires an api-version query param. The /openai/v1 base path requires an effective apiMode from global apiMode or modelOptions[modelId].apiMode.

apiKey.description: Azure API key value. In OpenCode JSON this is commonly an env placeholder like {env:AZURE_API_KEY}.

headers.description: Extra headers added to every request. If Authorization or api-key is set here, the provider does not auto-inject api-key from apiKey.

apiMode.description: Global mode override. Precedence is modelOptions[modelId].apiMode, then global apiMode, then mode inferred from the endpoint path.

toolPolicy.description: Tool handling policy. auto passes through, off strips tools and forces no tool choice, on forces required tool choice when tools exist and the choice is not already fixed.

timeout.description: Request timeout in milliseconds, or false to disable the timeout wrapper.

cooldownScope.description: Cooldown targeting after rate-limit pressure. global pauses all models on the provider instance; per-model isolates cooldown to the triggering model.

assistantReasoningSanitization.description: Assistant reasoning field sanitization policy. auto retries once with reasoning fields removed after a matching schema rejection and remembers strictness in-process for that model.

modelOptions.description: Per-model provider overrides keyed by runtime model id. Examples in OpenCode configs may use model aliases or ids; the provider contract is based on the model id it receives at runtime.

name.description: Optional provider id prefix used for diagnostics. Defaults to azure-foundry.

apiMode.description: Per-model mode override. Takes precedence over global apiMode and disables automatic cross-transport fallback for that model.

assistantReasoningSanitization.description: Per-model reasoning sanitization policy. Takes precedence over the global assistantReasoningSanitization value.

quotaOptions.description: Static quota controls plus retry and adaptive throttling settings.

models.description: Per-model quota overrides keyed by runtime model id. Unspecified fields inherit from quota.default.

rpm.description: Requests per minute. Non-positive values are treated as unset at runtime.

tpm.description: Tokens per minute. Non-positive values are treated as unset at runtime.

maxConcurrent.description: Maximum concurrent in-flight requests. Non-positive values are treated as unset at runtime.

maxOutputTokensCap.description: Upper bound applied to outgoing output-token budget fields. Non-positive values are treated as unset at runtime.

maxAttempts.description: Maximum request attempts including the first one. Runtime normalization floors values and clamps the minimum to 1.

baseDelayMs.description: Base retry delay in milliseconds. Runtime normalization floors values and clamps the minimum to 1.

maxDelayMs.description: Maximum retry delay in milliseconds. Runtime normalization floors values and clamps the minimum to 1.

jitterRatio.description: Retry jitter ratio. Runtime normalization clamps the minimum to 0.

honorRetryAfter.description: Whether to honor Retry-After headers on retryable responses.

cooldownOn429Ms.description: Base cooldown applied after 429 responses. Runtime normalization floors values and clamps the minimum to 0.

enabled.description: Enable adaptive throttling from Azure x-ratelimit-* response headers.

minCooldownMs.description: Minimum cooldown duration in milliseconds. Runtime normalization floors values and clamps the minimum to 0.

lowWatermarkRatio.description: Low-watermark threshold ratio in the inclusive range [0, 1]. Runtime normalization clamps values into that range.

lowCooldownMs.description: Cooldown applied when remaining request or token budgets fall below the low watermark. Runtime normalization floors values and clamps the minimum to 0.
